title: Innovative Low Fat French Chicken Bowl
description: A floral and snappy French dish featuring salsa and cooked in an earthenware bowl, perfect for a healthy meal prep option
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, thyme, rosemary, salt, and pepper
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Transfer the chicken to an earthenware bowl and bake for 20 minutes
While the chicken is cooking, heat the salsa in a small saucepan over medium heat
After the chicken has cooked for 20 minutes, brush the heated salsa on top of the chicken
Return the chicken to the oven and cook for an additional 10 minutes
Remove the chicken from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley
Serve the chicken hot in the earthenware bowl
